headlines.description: — With the Minnesota Vikings gathered in their humbled locker room at halftime in a huge hole, cornerback Patrick Peterson set the tone for an historic escape by promising his offensive teammates the defense would do its part to hold the Indianapolis...
headlines.shortLinkText: Comeback king Vikings set NFL rally record in win vs. Colts

headlines.description: — Deshaun Watson dropped to a knee for the third time to extinguish the final seconds. He turned and walked alone, taking a few steps before tilting his head back screaming into the frosty air.
headlines.shortLinkText: Watson throws for TD, wins home debut as Browns down Ravens

headlines.description: — Once the snow began falling at the start of the fourth quarter, Josh Allen and the Buffalo Bills found themselves in their element against the warm-weather Miami Dolphins.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bills clinch 4th straight playoff berth; beat Dolphins 32-29
